summary: Bug Fix Testing Complete - v51.3.0. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend GST Invoice Generator demo verified working. Daily Report PDF endpoints working (normal & detail mode). Entries PDF and Cashbook PDF endpoints working. WhatsApp footer correctly shows 'Thank you' instead of old Hindi text. Code review confirms has_payments conditional in daily_report.py.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - minor React hydration warning in GST rate dropdown

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Daily Report PDF /api/reports/daily/pdf works in both normal and detail modes
VERIFIED: Payments section is conditional (has_payments check) - only shows if msp_received, pvt_paddy_paid, or rice_sale_received > 0
VERIFIED: Cash Flow section has proper structure with cash_jama, cash_nikasi, bank_jama, bank_nikasi, net_cash, net_bank
VERIFIED: Entries PDF /api/export/pdf endpoint returns valid PDF
VERIFIED: Cashbook PDF /api/cash-book/pdf endpoint returns valid PDF
VERIFIED: WhatsApp footer changed to 'Thank you' - old 'Kripya baaki rashi ka bhugtan karein' removed
VERIFIED: WhatsApp send-payment-reminder and send-daily-report endpoints working (return proper error when no API key configured)
VERIFIED: GST Invoice Generator demo page renders correctly in Feature Demo tab
VERIFIED: GST Invoice preview modal opens with correct calculations (taxable, CGST, SGST, grand total)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data with date=2026-03-22 for daily report testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v51.3.0 bug fixes verified. Daily Report PDF conditional payments section working. WhatsApp footer shows 'Thank you / {company}'. GST Invoice Generator demo in Feature Demo tab working. All PDF export endpoints (/api/reports/daily/pdf, /api/export/pdf, /api/cash-book/pdf) returning valid PDFs.

daily_report_payments_conditional.details: has_payments check in daily_report.py verified - section only shows if any payment > 0

daily_report_cash_flow_structure.details: Cash flow has proper structure with cash/bank jama/nikasi and net values

whatsapp_footer_fix.details: whatsapp.py contains 'Thank you' and does NOT contain old Hindi footer text

whatsapp_send_payment_reminder.details: POST /api/whatsapp/send-payment-reminder returns 200 (error if no API key configured - expected)

whatsapp_send_daily_report.details: POST /api/whatsapp/send-daily-report returns 200 (error if no numbers configured - expected)

gst_invoice_generator_demo.details: Feature Demo tab shows GST Invoice Generator with working form, calculations, and preview modal
